case_title: DAVID ALVAREZ VS. MIGUEL GONZALES et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER FILED BY ALVAREZ, DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES, MIGUEL $6,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,780.00, DEFENDANT COOSEMAN'S DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT MIGUEL GONZALES NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY ALVAREZ, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MIGUEL COOSEMAN'S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-29-2008 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO COOSEMAN'S BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-29-2008 AT 6:30PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SERVICE INCOMPLETE, DID NOT MAIL COPY** SERVED JUL-11-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MIGUEL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. MARK P. SCHREIBER. PLAINITFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
